case_title: DONNA LAU (Guardian) et al VS. JUMBO SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO NANCY M.F. ZHENG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-22-2010 AT 10:00AM.
ORDER ON PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU (GUARDIAN AD LITEM), DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT JUMBO SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC. ZHENG, NANCY M.F.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED SEP-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JUMBO SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU (GUARDIAN AD LITEM), DONNA LAU (MINOR), SYDNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUMBO SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC. $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,075.00, DEFENDANT NANCY M.F. ZHENG DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NO INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LAU (GUARDIAN AD LITEM), DONNA LAU (MINOR), SYDNIE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JUMBO SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,838.76 FILED BY LAU (GUARDIAN AD LITEM), DONNA LAU (MINOR), SYDNIE AS TO DEFENDANT JUMBO SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC. ZHENG, NANCY M.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED SEP-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHENG, NANCY M.F.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DONNA LAU. MINOR SYDNIE LAU NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS PRESENT IN COURT, ASSISTED BY STATE CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER CARMEN LI. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
